title: 大學A&F求教, 求推介入門書

replies.msg:
小弟中學時期喺純理科人, 但大學被阿媽推咗去英國讀Account and Finance
入學弟一日已經聽唔明個法國嚟嘅lectuer講咩, yr1 就喺完全絕望嘅情況之下但又比我過到骨升咗去yr2
但yr2更加絕望, 因為我唔小心take埋yr3嘅野讀......
所以小弟想問吓噤多位大佬, 由淺入深, 簡單易明嘅網站/ 書推介一吓比細佬我

買返你year 1 d textbook 追返就算啦
accounting 底打得唔好 你讀上去會辛苦

你account定finance唔掂

最好講埋依家take咩course先比到advice你

你account定finance唔掂

最好講埋依家take咩course先比到advice你

而家讀緊principles of financial accounting 同financial statement analysis
principles of financial accounting 當中包括financial reporting for companies 同applying accounting concept to selected reporting issue - capital maintenance & creditor protection - recognition & measurement of asset - presentation
其實主要accounting 果part唔掂, 令到之後都唔掂

你account定finance唔掂

最好講埋依家take咩course先比到advice你

而家讀緊principles of financial accounting 同financial statement analysis
principles of financial accounting 當中包括financial reporting for companies 同applying accounting concept to selected reporting issue - capital maintenance & creditor protection - recognition & measurement of asset - presentation
其實主要accounting 果part唔掂, 令到之後都唔掂

我估principles of financial accounting係入門course,你應該溫熟呢到先
